name: Deep-Dish Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter, cut into small pieces
2 tablespoons butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
CREAM CHEESE PASTRY
Combine the flour and salt. Cut in the cream cheese and butter until the mixture has a coarse meal-like consistency. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead lightly, just until it holds together. Shape into a ball, flatten into a disk, dust with flour, wrap in plastic, and chill while preparing the filling.
FILLING
Preheat oven to 375°F. Place peaches in an 8-inch square baking dish or 2-quart casserole. In a small bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, and nutmeg. Toss with peaches, mixing gently until coated. Dot with butter.
ASSEMBLY
On lightly floured pastry cloth or board, roll out the pastry to be 1 inch larger than the baking dish (round). Roll onto rolling pin, then drape over the top of the dish. Crimp edges and press around the top. Brush surface with egg wash (beat egg yolk with water) and sprinkle with white sugar. Using a sharp knife, make 3-4 slits in the pastry to allow steam. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until crust is golden. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or heavy cream.
